schema.description: A salary estimate calculation for an S-Corp owner based on occupation, experience level, location, and business revenue.

uuid.description: The UUID of the salary estimate.

employee_uuid.description: The UUID of the employee this salary estimate is for.

employee_job_uuid.description: The UUID of the employee job this salary estimate is associated with (once accepted).

annual_net_revenue.description: The annual net revenue of the business used for salary calculations.

zip_code.description: The ZIP code used for location-based salary calculations.

result.description: The calculated reasonable salary estimate in cents. Null if not yet calculated.

accepted_at.description: The timestamp when this salary estimate was accepted and finalized.

created_at.description: The timestamp when this salary estimate was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when this salary estimate was last updated.

occupations.description: Array of occupations with their experience levels and time allocations.

code.description: Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) occupation code.

time_percentage.description: Percentage of time spent in this occupation (as decimal string, 0-1).

primary.description: Whether this is the primary occupation.

occupations.name: Software Developers, Systems Software
occupations.description: Research, design, develop, and test operating systems-level software.

schema.title: Salary-Estimate

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
